segment.source: Renders a heading and subheadline above a three-column grid of cards, each with an icon, an optionally linked title, and a rich-text description (minimum three items). Use it for: the classic 'three pillars' section — services, benefits, or product capabilities of similar weight on home and landing pages. Prefer '4-Column Feature Grid' for many short entries; 'Feature Cards Grid' when features have no icons; 'Icon Feature Grid' for selectable column counts.
